title: wdio-mocha-framework@0.5.1 breaks build 🚨
body:
Hello lovely humans, [wdio-mocha-framework](https://www.npmjs.com/package/wdio-mocha-framework) just published its new version 0.5.1.
State Failing tests :rotating_light:
Dependency wdio-mocha-framework
New version 0.5.1
Type devDependency
This version is **covered** by your **current version range** and after updating it in your project **the build went from success to failure**. As wdio-mocha-framework is “only” a devDependency of this project it **might not break production or downstream projects**, but “only” your build or test tools – **preventing new deploys or publishes**. I recommend you give this issue a high priority. I’m sure you can resolve this :muscle: Of course this could just be a false positive, caused by a flaky test suite, or third parties that are currently broken or unavailable, but that would be another problem I’d recommend working on. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 4 commits . - [`6973ee0`](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/commit/6973ee09768a691010d991774375a18981348d12) v0.5.1 - [`dd08873`](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/commit/dd08873eaae528c69e3dbc5d33aba40dd965961a) Update contributors - [`426f885`](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/commit/426f88514414aa0b4f2c44590715eada2d90409b) bump wdio-sync - [`80ee6d7`](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/commit/80ee6d7f351e7a00c31b32a944794abb57f96fd6) add test for async skip See the [full diff](https://github.com/webdriverio/wdio-mocha-framework/compare/cc989a627c72e69de9fdbc0830a256638c0e8ed7...6973ee09768a691010d991774375a18981348d12). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/).
